final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a traditional Hindu morning prayer ceremony on the Varanasi ghats along the Ganges River.

Style/medium: documentary humanistic photography, 35mm film aesthetic with rich saturated colors, in the spirit of Steve McCurry's India work
Composition: golden ratio framing, shallow depth of field, foreground with blurred flower petals, mid-ground featuring the central priest figure, background showing the distant riverbank silhouette
Subject: elderly priest in orange saffron robes holding a brass oil lamp, surrounded by devotees performing rituals
Scene/backdrop: Varanasi ghats at dawn, hundreds of Hindu devotees gathered on stone steps, some bathing in the river, others praying with folded hands, some lighting oil lamps to float on water
Lighting/mood: golden hour sunrise light from the horizon casting warm tones across the scene, soft diffused morning light mixed with rising incense smoke creating ethereal atmosphere
Color palette: warm golden sunrise as dominant tone, orange saffron robes as anchor, brass and copper metallic accents, soft pink and cream flower petals, deep blue-green river reflections
Materials/textures: weathered stone steps, brass oil lamps with patina, flowing water with floating flower offerings, billowing incense smoke, coarse cotton fabric of robes
Avoid: oversaturated HDR look, plastic textures, deformed hands, watermarked text, 8K stuffer aesthetic, artificial sharpening
